channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Elon Musk Reacts to Jamie Dimon's ‘Einstein’ Praise With Two-Word Reply as Viral Post Hails His SpaceX and Tesla Legacy
item.description: Elon Musk thanked JPMorgan Chase & Co. CEO Jamie Dimon on Wednesday after an X post revived the banker’s comparison of the Tesla Inc. chief to legendary physicist and inventor Albert Einstein.

item.title: Tesla and Alphabet Earnings: The Metrics That Matter Most
item.description: A duo of Magnificent 7 members, namely Tesla (TSLA) and Alphabet (GOOGL), will help headline the reporting docket this week, who both head into their reports with favorable revisions for both earnings and sales.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Google, Tesla, AMD Loom After AI Stock Sell-Off
item.description: Google earnings and capex guidance will be key for battered AI stocks. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also will report.

item.title: Tesla Releases Q2 2026 Earnings Estimates from Analysts
item.description: Tesla Releases Q2 2026 Earnings Estimates from Analysts

item.title: Yahoo Finance test drives Mercedes-Benz's new luxury EV, the CLA 250+
item.description: Mercedes-Benz (MBG.DE, MBGAF) is shifting into high gear with a new luxury EV designed to better compete with Tesla's (TSLA) Model 3. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian comes on Market Domination Overtime to discuss his test driving of the new CLA 250+ electric sedan.

item.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
item.description: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.

item.title: SpaceX Investors Face Harsh Reality Check
item.description: Post-IPO selloff deepens after another Starship setback

item.title: Podcast: TSLA shareholders wake up, Xpeng targets EU, VW goes cheaper, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla shareholders potentially starting to wake up, Xpeng targeting the European market, VW going cheaper with its EVs, and more.

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips — Investors Await Tesla’s Q2 Earnings And Semi Progress
item.description: Tesla said in a post on X on Friday that it has opened a new public Megacharger station in Bloomington, California, marking what the company’s team described as “the beginning of the Megacharger network.”

item.title: Getting to Know Your 2026 Tesla
item.description: I remember getting into my new 2019 Tesla six years ago. While basic driving controls were familiar, Tesla’s approach of having many control functions available only on the display screen was somewhat bewildering. There were also numerous new features that no one had thought of for cars previously.

item.title: Tesla Launches New Balance Bike for Kids
item.description: Tesla Launches New Balance Bike for Kids

item.title: Lucid Rallies 10% for a Third Straight Up Day, Leaving Tesla, Rivian Behind
item.description: Lucid stock is surging for a third straight session while Tesla and Rivian sit out the party, and the reason behind the divergence says a lot about how fragile this recovery really is.

item.title: Tesla now has a serious software rival
item.description: The first significant over-the-air (OTA) software update has begun rolling out for the Rivian R2, adding key features like Launch Mode, Pet Comfort, Gear Guard, and a host of other improvements. While the new features and enhancements are welcome, Rivian (RIVN) is emerging as one of the only Tesl...

item.title: Tesla’s Offensive in South America Continues as the Brand Arrives in Uruguay, Cuts Prices in Chile
item.description: Seven months ago, we announced that Tesla had arrived in the Colombian market looking for blood. With a Model 3 launched below $30,000 and a Model Y below $32,500, the brand was offering a premium feeling for mass market prices, outcompeting pretty much everyone else in the EV landscape, includin...

item.title: Tesla enters two new markets on two different continents in one week
item.description: Tesla entered two new markets this week by advancing its presence in Latvia (Europe) and officially launching operations in Uruguay (South America), marking a rapid dual-continent expansion. These moves underscore the company’s strategy to tap into emerging EV markets with supportive policies, re...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Price Prediction: How Much a $10,000 Investment Could Be Worth by 2027
item.description: Tesla is stacking catalysts from Cybercab and Optimus to unsupervised robotaxi rides, but volatile fundamentals and a trailing P/E above 350 mean a $10,000 bet on TSLA could land almost anywhere by 2027. The spread between best and worst case tells a very different story than the headline target.

item.title: SpaceX Falls After Starship Launch Abort
item.description: Elon Musk targets another launch attempt next week

item.title: SpaceX announces new Starship 13 test flight target date
item.description: SpaceX has announced a new target date for the thirteenth test flight of Starship: Monday, July 20, with the launch window opening at 6:45 p.m ET/5:45 p.m. CT. This is the first rescheduling attempt of Starship’s 13th test flight.

item.title: Tesla rides robotaxi momentum into earnings season
item.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) is heading into its second-quarter earnings report with robotaxis doing most of the talking. Bank of America reiterated its Buy rating on the stock and $460 price objective, pointing to the service's rapid expansion, a delivery number that blew past Wall Street...

item.title: Meta, Tesla, Nvidia: This ETF Went All-In on the Magnificent Seven. Is It Paying Off?
item.description: Capital Group's active growth ETF loads up on the same megacap giants driving every major index, charges almost nothing by active fund standards, and still finds a way to leave investors with a complicated story to tell.

item.title: Why Tesla Might Not Merge With SpaceX After All
item.description: Tesla stock has been stuck for the past few months, supported by hopes for a SpaceX merger while the company’s progress on AI efforts remain opaque.

item.title: Kevin O’Leary Says Tesla Stock Doesn’t Just Move With Earnings, It Moves With ‘Elon’s Tweets’ — One Post Swings It 10%. ‘Price You Pay For Growth’
item.description: "Shark Tank" investor Kevin O’Leary owns Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock — and by his own admission, that means signing up for a level of volatility most investors aren’t used to. "If you own Tesla stock like I do, you’re already used...

item.title: The Number That Could Test Tesla Stock
item.description: The company's vision for the future is bigger than ever, but its top-line growth has slowed dramatically. Here's why that one number matters more than the hype.

item.title: Tesla Opens World's First Public Megacharger Site
item.description: Tesla Opens World's First Public Megacharger Site

item.title: Mission aborted: Why Elon Musk canceled SpaceX's Starship launch
item.description: SpaceX (SPCX) canceled its Starship test flight on Thursday. CEO Elon Musk said the next attempt will "hopefully" be in a few days. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian explains what happened.

item.title: SpaceX Aborts Starship Test Flight 13 After Engine Failure, Completes SDA Mission
item.description: SpaceX on Thursday aborted the 13th test flight for its Starship rocket after some engines failed to ignite. SPCX stock fell.

item.title: Tesla launches in Latvia and Uruguay, expanding on two continents
item.description: Tesla opened two new markets in less than 24 hours, launching in Latvia and Uruguay in back-to-back announcements this week. The dual entry completes Tesla’s expansion across all three Baltic states and gives the automaker its third market in South America — two very different markets that show h...

item.title: Tesla FSD Investigation: NTSB Confirms Driver Pressed Accelerator in House Crash
item.description: Tesla FSD Investigation: NTSB Confirms Driver Pressed Accelerator in House Crash

item.title: Tesla, SpaceX and Meta Forecasts – Geopolitical Risks Trigger Pre-Market Tech Selling
item.description: Major tech companies are under pressure in early Friday pre-market trading.

item.title: Should You Buy Tesla Stock Before Earnings on July 22?
item.description: Tesla investors need to be patient as developments unfold, and there won't be a one-off, game-changing event at the company in 2027.

item.title: Alphabet's Waymo, Baidu Ahead of Competitors in Robotaxi Space, Wedbush Says
item.description: Alphabet's (GOOG) Waymo and Baidu (BIDU) are well ahead of competitors in the robotaxi industry, wit

item.title: Two Risks for Tesla Stock Not Everyone Is Talking About
item.description: Tesla stock has been stuck for the past few months, supported by hopes for a SpaceX merger while the company’s progress on AI efforts remain opaque.

item.title: Here’s How Much Traders See Tesla Stock Moving After Earnings
item.description: Tesla is set to report earnings Wednesday afternoon, with traders anticipating a big move from the EV maker’s stock following the results.

item.title: Elon Musk Is Betting Big on Natural Gas. Here's What It Means for Energy Stocks.
item.description: Natural gas remains vital for both current and future energy needs, and SpaceX investments are helping support demand.

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Slide As Chip Stocks Tumble, Iran Tensions Fuel Risk-Off Mood: Why NFLX, NBIS, SPCX, TSLA, DJT, SLS Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment remained ‘bullish’ on QQQ but moderated to ‘neutral’ on SPY.

item.title: Honda to end Prologue sales in the US
item.description: Honda has confirmed that it will discontinue the Prologue after the 2026 model year. The move marks the conclusion of Honda’s Ultium-based EV partnership with General Motors and leaves the brand without a BEV offering in North America.

item.title: Elon Musk Has Never Sold His Tesla Vision. Should You Buy the Dip Before July 22?
item.description: Is Tesla's dip below $400 a buying opportunity, or is Wall Street still pricing in too much optimism? Here's why the answer depends more on your long-term conviction than next week's earnings report.

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips Overnight: Gary Black Says SpaceX Can’t Afford Tesla – ‘The Math Won’t Pass Muster’
item.description: Black rejected speculation that SpaceX could acquire Tesla, saying Musk’s voting control does not remove SpaceX’s fiduciary duties.

item.title: SpaceX Starship Flight 13 aborted at Zero and Musk just told us what broke
item.description: SpaceX scrubbed the Starship Flight 13 launch attempt Thursday evening at the last possible moment, after four of the Super Heavy booster’s 33 Raptor 3 engines failed to ignite during the startup sequence. The 90-minute window had opened at 6:45 p.m. EDT from Starbase in Boca Chica, Texas, and th...

item.title: Tesla finally launches a bike — but it’s not what fans wanted
item.description: Tesla fans have spent years begging the company to build an e-bike. Tesla just launched a bike — and it has no motor, no pedals, and it’s for toddlers. The new “Balance Bike for Kids” sells for $225 on Tesla’s online shop, and it’s aimed at children aged 2 to 5.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) shareholders are begging Musk to explain missed goals
item.description: Tesla shareholders have flooded the company’s Q2 2026 earnings Q&A portal with questions, and the most-upvoted ones tell a bleak story: retail investors are now demanding that Elon Musk explain why the company keeps missing its own short-term goals. The tone has shifted from asking about Tesla’s ...

item.title: Tesla's 2026 Q2 Earnings Call: How to Listen
item.description: Tesla's 2026 Q2 Earnings Call: How to Listen

item.title: Tesla Was Cleared in a Texas Crash. Why the Stock Is Down Anyway.
item.description: Tesla’s FSD driver assistance product was cleared in a recent tragic crash in Texas that killed one person.

item.title: SpaceX Stock Breaks The IPO Price—and Cathie Wood Keeps Buying the Dip
item.description: SpaceX stock has lost altitude recently, closing below its IPO price for the first time on Thursday, creating an opportunity for Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest. ARK is a big believer in Elon Musk. It was the stock’s first close below the $135 IPO price.

item.title: Tesla Earnings Loom After Surprise Delivery Beat Stuns Wall Street
item.description: Tesla Stock Faces Its Biggest Test Yet. Here's What Investors Need to See

item.title: Elon Musk Buys Gas Turbine Company in $1 Billion Deal
item.description: Elon Musk Buys Gas Turbine Company in $1 Billion Deal

item.title: Elon Musk's Net Worth Is Plummeting -- Here's What That Means for SpaceX Stock
item.description: He is no longer a trillionaire.

item.title: Elon Musk's Political Spending Hits $90 Million With New $5 Million Donation
item.description: FEC filings show Musk increased support for Republican candidates, including Vivek Ramaswamy's Ohio gubernatorial campaign.

item.title: SpaceX Bears Gain as Stock Drops
item.description: Stock slides below IPO price before key catalysts

item.title: Tesla Delivered 480,126 Vehicles Last Quarter. Here's Why the Stock Didn't Rally.
item.description: Good news isn't necessarily bullish when the company is changing faster than investors can fill in the unknowns.
